sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93500" key="sbe/sse" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σβέσ-σε</orth>, adverbial Suffix, denoting <sense id="n93500.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">motion towards</tr_>, e.g.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄλλοσε</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to some other place</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμφοτέρωσε</foreign>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
